Question: How did Bill Gates do in high school?

Answer:
generation: Bill Gates was not an exceptional student in high school. He skipped the 10th grade and graduated early from Lakeside School in Seattle at the age of 17. However, he was more interested in computers and programming than his academic studies. At Harvard University, he dropped out after two years to focus on Microsoft with Paul Allen.
